atoms.name: Openapi
atoms.description: This project is a server that dynamically creates Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools and resources from OpenAPI specifications. It allows Large Language Models (LLMs) to interact with APIs through the Model Context Protocol.

atoms.name: Prometheus
